overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban intersection in a video game environment resembling Los Santos from GTA V. The camera moves steadily through wet streets illuminated by streetlights and neon signs, approaching a fast-food restaurant and passing pedestrians on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked multi-lane intersection with palm trees

events.description: green sedan drives through the intersection from left to right, splashing through wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet intersection toward the opposite corner

notable_agents.action: green sedan turning left and driving through the intersection, headlights illuminating the wet road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street, silhouetted against streetlights
tall traffic light pole with red signal visible, spanning across the intersection
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting streetlights and vehicle headlights with glossy surface
tall street lamps casting yellow-white light through the rain and mist
low-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked urban intersection at night, with palm trees visible on the left and streetlights cutting through the hazy darkness. A green sedan drives through the intersection, its headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt as the camera holder walks steadily forward through the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with illuminated fast food restaurant

events.description: Mr. Donald's fast food restaurant with bright red neon signage becomes visible on the right side
approaching stopped vehicles waiting at the red traffic light on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking toward the corner with the fast food restaurant, observing the parked cars and neon signs

notable_agents.action: dark sedan stopped at the red light, waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: single-story fast food restaurant with bright red neon signage reading 'Mr. Donald's' and yellow awning
several vehicles stopped at the traffic light along the right curb
white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves through the intersection, a brightly lit Mr. Donald's fast food restaurant emerges on the right, its red neon signage reflecting off the wet pavement. Several cars are stopped at the red light along the curb, and the camera approaches the corner where pedestrians are gathered near the restaurant entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk in front of fast food restaurant with pedestrians

events.description: passing two pedestrians standing on the street corner near the crosswalk button
moving from the street onto the concrete sidewalk alongside the restaurant

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians, moving past the restaurant front

notable_agents.action: two men standing on the corner, one wearing a white t-shirt with black logo and the other in a striped shirt
person walking away down the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: concrete utility pole with a pedestrian crossing button attached at chest height
wet concrete pavement with red-painted curb, littered with small debris

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto the concrete sidewalk, passing two men standing on the corner near a utility pole with a crosswalk button. The Mr. Donald's restaurant remains visible on the right as the camera continues down the sidewalk, moving away from the intersection into the urban streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a rain-slicked urban intersection toward a brightly lit commercial sidewalk at night. It begins in the middle of a crosswalk where streetlights cut through the hazy darkness and a green sedan drives past, its headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to reveal a Mr. Donald's fast food restaurant on the right, its red neon signage casting a glow over the pavement and a line of cars stopped at a red light. The movement then shifts from the street onto the concrete sidewalk, passing pedestrians gathered near a utility pole and a crosswalk button. Finally, the camera continues past the restaurant entrance, moving away from the intersection and deeper into the urban streetscape.
